allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Progress: {d[\\"progress\\"][\\"complete\\"]}/{d[\\"progress\\"][\\"total\\"]}'\); print\('State:', d['state']\)")
